subcodes.first_line: O people of God! This is the Day of steadfastness, for from every direction some matter hath appeared and from every quarter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حزب الله یوم یوم استقامت است چه که از هر جهتی امری ظاهر و از هر شطری
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @wisdom [hikmat], @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
